patterns.title: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Patterns
patterns.subtitle: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Behavioral patterns detected from your check-ins
patterns.empty: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: No patterns detected yet â€” keep logging check-ins

privacy.headline: Privacy
privacy.body: Your data stays on your device unless you explicitly choose to share it. We do not sell data, run ads, or use behavioral fingerprinting.

safety.headline: Safety
safety.body: Discipline OS is not a crisis hotline replacement. If you are in immediate danger, use the crisis path or call your local emergency number.

journal.title: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Journal
journal.subtitle: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Your private space to reflect.
journal.emptyBody: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Your entries are private and only visible to you. Start writing to track your journey.

checkIn.pageSubtitle: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: How are you feeling right now?
checkIn.compassionBody: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Recording how you feel is the first step. Would you like to try a coping tool?
checkIn.copingPrompt: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Consider using a coping tool while you wait for the urge to pass.

companion.headline: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: I slipped. Now what?
companion.subheadline: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: A slip doesn't erase your progress. Take one step at a time.
companion.stepCheckInDesc: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Record what happened and how you're feeling
companion.stepReadDesc: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: A compassion-first guide for this moment

tools.title: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Coping Tools
tools.subtitle: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Evidence-based techniques for managing urges.
tools.featuredDescription: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: A great first tool if you're new or unsure where to begin.

boxBreathing.name: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Box Breathing
boxBreathing.description: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: A simple breathing pattern that calms the nervous system in minutes.

grounding54321.name: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: 5-4-3-2-1 Grounding
grounding54321.description: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Anchor yourself to the present moment using your five senses.

pmr.name: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Progressive Muscle Relaxation
pmr.description: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Systematically release tension held in your body.

coldWater.name: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Cold Water Reset
coldWater.description: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Splashing cold water activates the dive reflex to slow your heart rate.

urgeSurfing.name: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Urge Surfing
urgeSurfing.description: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Observe the urge like a wave â€” it rises, peaks, and passes.

stopTechnique.name: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: STOP Technique
stopTechnique.description: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Stop, Take a breath, Observe, Proceed mindfully.

compassionMeditation.name: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Compassion Meditation
compassionMeditation.description: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Direct kindness toward yourself during a difficult moment.

delayDistract.name: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Delay & Distract
delayDistract.description: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Commit to waiting 10 minutes â€” urges nearly always pass.

assessments.title: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Assessments
assessments.subtitle: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Validated questionnaires to track your mental health over time.
assessments.disclaimer: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Scores are for self-monitoring only and not a diagnosis. Consult a healthcare professional.

descriptions.phq-9: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Measures how often you have been bothered by depressive symptoms over the past two weeks.
descriptions.gad-7: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Measures how often you have been bothered by anxiety symptoms over the past two weeks.
descriptions.who-5: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Measures your general wellbeing over the past two weeks.
descriptions.audit-c: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: A brief screen for hazardous or harmful alcohol consumption.
descriptions.pss-10: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Measures the degree to which situations in your life are perceived as stressful over the past month.

reports.empty: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: No reports yet â€” check back after your first assessment

privacy.title: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Privacy
privacy.downloadDescription: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Export your check-ins, journal, and assessment history as JSON
privacy.deleteDescription: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
privacy.deleteDialogBody: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: This will permanently delete your account, all check-ins, journal entries, assessment results, and usage history. This action cannot be undone.
privacy.deleteWarning: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.
privacy.downloadErrorGeneric: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Something went wrong. Please try again.
privacy.deleteErrorGeneric: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.

appearance.title: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Appearance
appearance.themeDescription: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Choose between dark and light mode
appearance.motionReduceDesc: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Disables breathing animations and ambient transitions. Does not affect OS-level reduced-motion.

categories.understandingAddictionDesc: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Learn what drives urges and how the brain changes with recovery
categories.cbtSkillsDesc: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Practical cognitive-behavioral techniques for managing urges
categories.mindfulnessBasicsDesc: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Grounding practices to build present-moment awareness
categories.sleepRecoveryDesc: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: How sleep and rest underpin lasting behavior change
categories.crisisSafetyDesc: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: When to reach out and how to find immediate support

articles.howItWorksExcerpt: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: A plain-language explanation of the urge-behavior cycle and how Discipline OS supports you.
articles.howItWorksBody: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Urges are brief. They typically peak within 15â€“20 minutes and then subside â€” whether or not you act on them. The Discipline OS check-in captures that moment so you can learn your own patterns over time.
articles.assessmentsExplainedExcerpt: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: What PHQ-9, GAD-7, and the other validated scales measure and why they matter.
articles.assessmentsExplainedBody: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Validated psychometric instruments give you and your care team an objective window into how you are doing. PHQ-9 measures depression severity; GAD-7 measures anxiety; WHO-5 measures wellbeing. Scores are always shown in standardized format so they can be compared with published research.
articles.afterALapseExcerpt: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: A lapse is not a failure. Here is how to use it as information.
articles.afterALapseBody: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Slipping once does not erase your progress. Resilience is measured in days of effort, not in days without any urge. The compassion-first framing here is intentional: shame is a high-risk state, not a motivator.
articles.urgeSurfingExcerpt: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Ride the wave rather than fighting it â€” a mindfulness-based urge technique.
articles.urgeSurfingBody: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Urge surfing treats an urge like an ocean wave: it rises, crests, and falls on its own. Instead of suppressing or acting on the urge, you observe it with curiosity. Notice where you feel it in your body. Name it. Watch it shift.
articles.cognitiveDefusionExcerpt: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: See thoughts as events, not facts â€” the core ACT technique.
articles.cognitiveDefusionBody: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Cognitive defusion creates distance between you and your thoughts. Instead of 'I need to use,' you practice 'I am having the thought that I need to use.' That small shift weakens the thought's grip.
articles.implementationIntentionsExcerpt: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: If-then plans that make coping automatic when stress peaks.
articles.implementationIntentionsBody: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Research shows that pre-committing to a specific 'if situation X, then I will do Y' response dramatically increases follow-through during high-stress moments. Write your plan when calm; execute it when triggered.
articles.boxBreathingExcerpt: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: The 4-4-4-4 technique used by Navy SEALs and clinical populations alike.
articles.boxBreathingBody: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Inhale for 4 counts. Hold for 4. Exhale for 4. Hold for 4. Repeat 4 cycles. This activates the parasympathetic nervous system and reduces cortisol within minutes.
articles.bodyScanExcerpt: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: A progressive relaxation technique that restores presence.
articles.bodyScanBody: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Lie or sit comfortably. Starting at your feet, bring gentle attention to each area of your body â€” noticing sensation without judgment. Move slowly upward. This practice interrupts the anxiety loop that drives urges.
articles.selfCompassionExcerpt: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Kristen Neff's three-component model applied to recovery.
articles.selfCompassionBody: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Self-compassion has three components: mindfulness (noticing suffering without exaggerating it), common humanity (recognizing that struggle is part of the shared human experience), and self-kindness (treating yourself as you would a good friend).
articles.gettingStartedExcerpt: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Your first week with Discipline OS â€” what to do and what to expect.
articles.gettingStartedBody: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Start with one check-in per day. You do not need to log every urge â€” just log honestly when you do. The app learns your patterns from real data, not from perfect data.
articles.tippTechniqueExcerpt: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Temperature, Intense exercise, Paced breathing, Progressive relaxation â€” the DBT crisis toolkit.
articles.tippTechniqueBody: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: TIPP skills work by changing your physiology quickly. Cold water on the face activates the dive reflex. Intense exercise burns off adrenaline. Paced breathing slows the heart rate. Use TIPP when emotion is so high that cognitive skills cannot get traction.
articles.contactAHumanExcerpt: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: When to reach out â€” and how to make it easier before you need it.
articles.contactAHumanBody: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Identify one person you trust before you need them. Tell them you may call in a crisis. Rehearse the call in your head. The crisis resources in the Help section are also available 24/7.
articles.safetyResourcesExcerpt: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: Free, confidential support lines available around the clock.
articles.safetyResourcesBody: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: You are never alone in a crisis. The helplines listed in the Help tab are verified, free, and confidential. If you are in immediate danger, call emergency services.

notifications.nudgeSectionDesc: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: How often we nudge you to check in when urges may be rising

section.dailyTipBody: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: When an urge rises, wait 60 seconds before acting. Urges peak and fall like waves â€” most pass within 3â€“5 minutes.

patterns.empty: __NEEDS_REVIEW__: No patterns detected yet. Keep checking in â€” insights appear with more data.
